title: streptanthus glaucus
intro: Streptanthus glaucus, also known as the Pacific jewelflower, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Streptanthus glaucus include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and providing relief from congestion and coughs. The plant's leaves and flowers can be prepared into teas, tinctures, and salves, which are commonly used in herbal remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
